{{Alo inversion}}Celestial marriage or Alpha marriage is the highest tier of [[marriage]] or [[syzygy]]. It legitimates having children

[[Category:Syzygy]]
[[sn:Alpha syzygy]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Alpha syzygy]][[sn:Alpha syzygy]][[Category:Family]]
[[sn:Alpha syzygy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
